metadata.name: Handle a Contestable Life Insurance Claim

description: A death claim has been filed on a policy that is still within the two-year contestability period.

nodes.task_description: Identify that the claim is within the contestability period.

expected_outcome.value: The claims examiner flags the claim for additional investigation.

nodes.task_description: Order the deceased's medical records to compare against the information provided on the application.

expected_outcome.value: The examiner orders all relevant medical records from the insured's doctors.

nodes.task_description: Review the records for any material misrepresentations. If none are found, approve the claim.

expected_outcome.value: After review, the examiner finds no misrepresentations and proceeds to approve and pay the claim.
